result.status_detail: gamma APF v2.2.4 d29d868 verify — engine intercept LIKELY fired (outline generation request failed with HTTP error), but no visible '차단' warning rendered to user. Gamma showed only its generic '[PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request' (console.error) and rendered an EMPTY 윤곽선 (outline) page with 1 blank card (0/50000 chars). No APF DOM marker, no 차단 text, no warning bubble or replacement page injected. PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) was preserved in prompt input field but outline content was suppressed. Mission anchor (PII prompt → warning visible on user screen) NOT satisfied — user sees only a generic gamma error, not an APF block notice.
console_errors: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

notes: Test flow: Opened Chrome on test PC (focused via SwitchToThisWindow + ctrl+win+left to switch desktop). Navigated to https://gamma.app/create/generate via Ctrl+L. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) applied. DevTools Console was already open. Injected PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?' into contenteditable DIV via JS (textarea/role=textbox not found; first attempt had a unicode typo, second attempt SET:DIV:46 confirmed correct 46-char prompt). Defaults left as: 카드 10개 / 클래식 / 기본 / 한국어. Clicked '개요 생성' button (id=25, coords 1298,635). Page navigated to /create/generate/i88be8stx89uivl after ~15s wait. Console showed RED ERROR '[PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request' (1 error count, 2 warnings). 윤곽선 (outline) section rendered EMPTY — only 1 blank card, '총 카드 1개', '0/50000' chars. DOM query confirmed: apfMark=false, hasBlockText=false (no '차단'), hasBlocked=false, rrnInDom=true (prompt echoed in input). Verdict=PARTIAL because: engine_intercept_fired=true (HTTP request rejected → outline generation failed) but warning_visible=false (no APF '차단' warning text/page/bubble injected; user sees only gamma's generic error). For full OK verdict, APF would need to inject '차단' warning into the page after request rejection. Current behavior: APF silently rejects the upstream request, gamma falls back to its own error UX which does not communicate the block reason to the user.
